title: 71% of U.S. homeowners say their home insurance costs have gone up
summary_en: The two reasons homeowners cite most often are insurance companies wanting to make more money and the costs of repairing and rebuilding.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心调查显示71%的美国房主称住房保险成本上涨

title: Many Americans hold utility companies responsible for their rising home energy bills
summary_en: Three-quarters of U.S. adults say their home energy costs have gone up in recent years, including 42% who say these costs have gone up a lot.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心调查显示多数美国成年人认为公用事业公司应对家庭能源账单上涨负责

title: How question wording affects polling on the morality of homosexuality
summary_en: Americans largely don’t distinguish between the morality of “homosexuality” and “homosexual behavior,” though some subgroups may, according to a new survey experiment.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布问卷措辞对同性恋道德认知民调结果影响的相关研究结论

title: About half of Americans continue to say Trump administration is doing ‘too much’ on deportations
summary_en: The share saying the administration is doing too little to deport immigrants living in the country illegally has risen slightly, mainly driven by Republicans.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心调查显示约半数美国人认为特朗普政府遣返非法移民举措力度过大
